text:
Under Control (, rom. Andā・Kontorōru) is a card exclusive to the physical Greed Island card set.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This card allows one of the G.I. Game Masters to stop an NPC or an enemy from taking any further actions.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.-001 :: 
NPCもしくはエネミーの行動を停止する
|-
![Eng]
|No.-001 :: Under Control 
Stop an NPC or enemy from taking any actions
|}
